metadata.title: Generate a governed sales_offer_prompt artifact for a developer in the United States, using the compiler_lens to resolve multi_runtime_confusion from chaotic input (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) and produce an SR8-compilable directive with explicit validation gates.

mission.primary_objective: Generate a governed sales_offer_prompt artifact for a developer in the United States, using the compiler_lens to resolve multi_runtime_confusion from chaotic input (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) and produce an SR8-compilable directive with explicit validation gates.
mission.success_definition: The artifact is a valid sales_offer_prompt with artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, and compiled_intent fields.; compiled_intent contains Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract sections.; All chaos input types (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) are explicitly addressed in the artifact.; Validation gates are present and clearly defined for each SR8 section.; The artifact can be directly compiled by SR8 into a runnable directive.; No markdown fences or extraneous text outside the JSON object.

in_scope.item: The artifact must be a sales_offer_prompt that includes all required SR8 sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract. It must handle the chaos input type 'multi_runtime_confusion' by normalizing missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria into a structured, governed format. The prompt must be suitable for Codex runtime execution.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: The artifact is a valid sales_offer_prompt with artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, and compiled_intent fields.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: compiled_intent contains Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract sections.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: All chaos input types (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) are explicitly addressed in the artifact.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are present and clearly defined for each SR8 section.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 5
gate.pass_condition: The artifact can be directly compiled by SR8 into a runnable directive.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 6
gate.pass_condition: No markdown fences or extraneous text outside the JSON object.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.offer_goal: Generate a governed sales_offer_prompt artifact for a developer in the United States, using the compiler_lens to resolve multi_runtime_confusion from chaotic input (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) and produce an SR8-compilable directive with explicit validation gates.

pain_points.item: The artifact must be a sales_offer_prompt that includes all required SR8 sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract. It must handle the chaos input type 'multi_runtime_confusion' by normalizing missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria into a structured, governed format. The prompt must be suitable for Codex runtime execution.

SRXML_Artifact.value_proposition: The artifact must be a sales_offer_prompt that includes all required SR8 sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract. It must handle the chaos input type 'multi_runtime_confusion' by normalizing missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria into a structured, governed format. The prompt must be suitable for Codex runtime execution.

proof_policy.item: Must include explicit validation gates for each SR8 section (e.g., completeness checks, consistency checks, ambiguity resolution).
Must not assume any missing context; instead, define placeholders or default behaviors for missing data.
Urgent language must be translated into priority levels and deadlines within the Constraints section.
Partial constraints must be expanded to full constraint statements with fallback defaults.
Ambiguous acceptance criteria must be clarified with at least two possible interpretations and a resolution rule.
Must be a single JSON object with no markdown fences.
Must comply with US legal and regulatory standards for sales offers (e.g., truth-in-advertising, data privacy).

conversion_path.item: format: JSON object with keys: artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, compiled_intent
compiled_intent: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: array of strings; Success Criteria: array of strings; Output Contract: object with format and compiled_intent fields

validation_gates: Gate 1: Verify all required keys are present and non-null.; Gate 2: Ensure compiled_intent contains all five required sections.; Gate 3: Check that each constraint is a complete sentence with no ambiguity.; Gate 4: Confirm success criteria are measurable and testable.; Gate 5: Validate that output contract specifies format and structure.; Gate 6: Ensure no markdown fences or external formatting.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
